docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $740.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ MARIO AS TO DEFENDANT MEDALLO GEMMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEDALLO GEMMA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ MARIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDALLO GEMMA $740.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $768.00, DEFENDANT MUST RETURN CAR TO PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFEND. RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MEDALLO GEMMA HEARING SET FOR JUL-07-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF JUL-07-1993, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT MEDALLO GEMMA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MEDALLO GEMMA
